subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath subdued the world through His sovereignty and drawn the nations through His signs, before Whom all things stand in acknowledgment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی سخر العالم بسلطانه و اجتذب الامم بایاته الذی اعترف کلشیء
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @Hands of the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @wisdom [hikmat]
